title: HyFanStr Peel and Stick Wall Tile Stickers, 3D Mosaic Kitchen Backsplash, Light Blue, 4 Pack
features: 3D TILE STICKERS -Made of Waterproof PET Paper + Epoxy Material, which makes a real tile look quickly and transform your kitchen backsplashes, kitchen walls, bathroom walls, living room walls or laundry room in a short time.

BRIGHT EFFECT - The 3D colloids of the tiles stickers look crystal and clear in the light, which will brighten up the whole room. The decorative effect of wall stickers will be more beautiful in the light.
PACKAGE : The size of each piece tile sticker is 23.6cmx23.6cm/ 9.29"x9.29" (included: 4 pcs ). A pack of 4 sheets, cover an area 2.36sq.ft (0.22sq m).
EASY TO ClEAN - This 3D tile sticker has a certain thickness, smooth surface, easy cleaning with a damp sponge or a bit of non abrasive cleaner.

EASY TO INSTALL AND DIY - Just peel and stick! The 3d mosaic tile stickers won't stretch, so it makes it more friendly to apply to the surface and if needed, it could be adjusted without being distorted. If need to cut, you could use a level to mark the line, which makes the cutting more accurater.
